name: Herbed Sweet Pepper Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds ripe tomatoes, peeled, seeded and chopped
2 cups canned chicken broth diluted with 2 cups water
1 1/4 tablespoons fresh ginger, peeled and minced
salt and fresh ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large pot. Add the onion, sweet red peppers, and garlic, coating everything with the oil. Reduce heat and cover, stirring occasionally until the onion and peppers are soft, about 30 minutes.
2. Remove the cover and stir in the tomatoes, herbs, bay leaves, chicken broth (diluted with water), cumin, ginger, salt, and pepper. Increase heat to bring to a boil, then simmer on low heat for 30 minutes.
3. Turn off the heat and let cool for 20 minutes. Transfer to a blender and puree. After cooling, refrigerate up to 2 days. Reheat over low heat.
